description: The 'Ndrina Sia is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Soverato, Calabria, Italy, with influence in neighboring towns. It is allied with several other 'ndrine and has been involved in a violent feud from 2008 to 2010 that resulted in about twenty deaths. The organization is involved in drug trafficking and has connections in Rome, Milan, and Turin. Recent operations have targeted its leadership and assets.
